productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Solid Red Handbag
description: Update your style quotient with ease by adding this stylish red and white bag from lino perros. Roomy and comfortable to carry, the smooth silhouette of this bag blends well with any outfit. Height: 28 cmWidth: 40 cmDepth: 10 cm Made of Leatherette with Leatherette strips attached to the mouth and base for added style and metallic tabs at the top of each strap Has one zippered compartment with an inner zipper and organiser sleeves for a mobile and essentials Two short handles for carrying ease and style One zippered compartment at the back for additional space Metallic legs at the base for stability Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
